sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Interesting! The charcoal moved from cols 22-25 to cols 26-29! So the charcoal CAN move past cols 22-25. Earlier I thought it was blocked, but it wasn't. The charcoal moved to cols 26-29.
Now the charcoal is at cols 26-29, and the green strip is at cols 24-25. The green gap is at cols 28-29.
Wait, the charcoal is at cols 26-29, which overlaps with the green gap at cols 28-29! The green gap is at cols 28-29, and the charcoal is at cols 26-29. So the charcoal is partially overlapping with the green gap.
But the level didn't complete. Let me continue pushing right to see if the charcoal moves further.
Actually, let me look at the current image. The charcoal is at cols 26-29, and the green strip is at cols 24-25. The green gap is at cols 28-29. The charcoal overlaps with the green gap.
Wait, but the green gap is at rows 40-43, and the charcoal is at rows 52-57. They're at different vertical positions. So the charcoal doesn't actually overlap with the green gap vertically.
But the charcoal is now at cols 26-29, which is to the right of the gray wall's concave section. Let me continue pushing right to see if the charcoal moves further.
Actually, let me think about this. In Level 1, the charcoal teleported when it went off the left edge. In Level 2, the charcoal can move past cols 22-25. Maybe the charcoal teleports when it goes off the right edge.
Let me continue pushing right to see if the charcoal teleports when it goes off the right edge.
The charcoal is at cols 26-29. The right edge is at col 63. So the charcoal needs to move 34 more columns to reach the right edge. That's 34/4 = 8.5 pushes, so about 9 pushes.
But that seems like a lot of actions. Let me try pushing right a few more times to see if the charcoal teleports.
Actually, wait. Let me look at the current image more carefully. The charcoal is at cols 26-29, and the green strip is at cols 24-25. The green gap is at cols 28-29. The charcoal overlaps with the green gap horizontally (cols 28-29).
But the green gap is at rows 40-43, and the charcoal is at rows 52-57. They're at different vertical positions.
Hmm, let me continue pushing right to see what happens.

sections.label: ASSISTANT
sections.content:
World model: Charcoal moved past cols 22-25 to cols 26-29! Not blocked after all. Green strip at cols 24-25.
Goal model: Maybe charcoal teleports when it goes off the right edge, like Level 1's left-edge teleport.
Plan: Continue pushing right to see if charcoal teleports off the right edge.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Push charcoal right multiple times to see if it teleports
for i in range(10):
    action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 45, 'col': 1}])
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 16:
            print(f"After push {i+1}: Charcoal at cols {n['boundary'][0][1]}-{n['boundary'][4][1] if len(n['boundary'])>4 else n['boundary'][0][1]+3}")
    if last_action_result.get('level_completed'):
        print("Level completed!")
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
